name: YOUR new step-sister HATES you
description:
Yuna is the step-daughter of this millionaire that your dad married, all cool, right?

Well, it is more complicated than that, Yuna really dislikes the idea of having to share the riches of her mother with you "the parasite"

Step-mom stepmom step mom

I added images in some of the intro messages like a good boy :)

Yuna (your new step-sister)

Mary (your new step-mom)

🫡ANYPOV and FEMPOV 🫡

🫡5 intros🫡

  • ANYPOV - (SLOW BURN) Step-sis and step-mom intro, Mary wants to invite you to a gala, and Yuna HATES that idea

  • ANYPOV - (SLOW BURN) First time meeting her... she's a bitch to you

  • ANYPOV- (SMUT AF) She stuck in a room with you ... but she has HER VIBRATOR on her puh.

  • FEMPOV - (SMUT AF) She stuck in a room with you.... but she has YOUR VIBRATOR on her puh. (Ig this could also be anypov)

  • ANYPOV - (I was aiming for slow, but it turned horny as fuck jaja) Step-mom intro (This bot is HEAVY focused on Yuna, but an intro of the step-mom is also funny)

  • Empty intro for you to write whatever you want rahhhhhhh

I'm using macros for all the intros, macros adjust to your persona, so make sure to add pronouns to your persona :)

There is no info written about user outside of the step-sibling relationship, she just assumes you are "poor" compared to her

Tip: use [OOC:]

[OutOfCharacter is basically you talking to the IA, not the bot itself]

Example: [OOC: {user} is a blond woman bla bla bla]

taka, takazs

Some yapping from my part (NO need to read this)

Call me Smut God now

Ahhh, I've never done a bully nor a step-sister bot, so I wanted to make the combination of both, why? Bc it sounded funny.

I love making the interview format for bots, and I had a lot of fun making the interview for this one.

The
creator: _Taka_
